title: Aggregation
description:
An EDM/ORE aggregation: the wrapper Europeana/ECCCH actually ingests, pairing a
`heritage-object` with the `digital-representation`(s) that depict it and the
provider/rights metadata needed for publishing (CIDOC-CRM and PROV-O don't model this —
it's an EDM/ORE-specific layer over the heritage object and digital representation blocks).

id.description: The persistent or local URI identifying this aggregation.

aggregatedCHO.description: URI of the `heritage-object` (the "Cultural Heritage Object") this aggregation wraps (edm:aggregatedCHO).

isShownBy.description: URI of the primary `digital-representation` used to display the object, e.g. a high-resolution image or 3D model (edm:isShownBy).

isShownAt.description: URI of a landing page where the object can be viewed in its original context, e.g. the providing institution's own website (edm:isShownAt).

hasView.description: URIs of additional `digital-representation`(s) for this object beyond the primary one in `isShownBy` (edm:hasView).

object.description: URI of a thumbnail image representing the aggregation (edm:object).

dataProvider.description: Name of the institution that physically holds the object and supplied this metadata (edm:dataProvider).

provider.description: Name of the aggregator that submitted the data on the data provider's behalf, e.g. an ECCCH national aggregator (edm:provider).

rights.description: URI of a rights statement governing reuse of the aggregated content, typically from rightsstatements.org or a Creative Commons license (edm:rights).
